content.problemStatement: Fix the error in the code provided.
content.inputFormat: First line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. No further input per test case.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print the numbers 1 2 3 4 5 separated by a single space on a new line.

sampleTestCases.explanation: With a single test case, the fixed array is printed once.
Two test cases result in two identical lines.
Three test cases, each printing the same array.

solution.approach: The problem requires printing a fixed array for each test case. Read the number of test cases T, then repeat the same output T times. No computation is needed beyond looping.
solution.timeComplexity: O(T) – one constant‑time operation per test case.
solution.spaceComplexity: O(1) – only a few variables are used regardless of T.
